title: Vanilla+
description: A better version of vanilla (ENTIRELY CLIENT SIDE)
body:
This modpack makes Minecraft vanilla 1000x better (in my opinion). I personally use this modpack because it adds a lot of eye candy and better navigation in the game. It also makes the game look a little more realistic while keeping the vanilla feel. And even more info, this modpack gives very good fps because of the fps enhancing mods in the modpack such as Entity Culling and Sodium.

  This modpack does not change anything about the vanilla game, so you are able to join any server you want. This modpack is meant to also make the game a little bit easier to navigate such as REI and Shulker Box Tooltips.

_____________________________________________________

IF THERE ARE ANY BUGS, PLEASE MESSAGE ME ON MY DISCORD!! (cripplingsouls)
